# Bangumi Theme Improvements Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Fix bangumi data/cover reliability, compact the bangumi UI, remove bottom whitening effect with backup-first workflow, and replace dark mode switch style while preserving existing theme behavior.

**Architecture:** Keep existing Hexo theme structure and implement targeted changes in generator/template/style layers. Use page front-matter as the bangumi content source of truth, with optional experimental Bilibili fetch and deterministic fallback to manual entries. Preserve current dark-mode JS contract by only changing markup/CSS structure around `#dark-mode-switch`.

**Tech Stack:** Hexo, EJS templates, Stylus, vanilla JavaScript (Node runtime + browser runtime)

---

### Task 1: Stabilize bangumi data source and metadata normalization

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/generator/bangumi.js`
- Modify: `layout/bangumi.ejs`
- Test: `scripts/generator/bangumi.js` (runtime verification via `hexo generate`)

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing test case description and expected outcomes**

```md
Input fixture (conceptual):
- bangumi page front-matter contains one item with source_url and missing cover/url/title
- metadata page returns og:image as relative path `/cover.jpg`

Expected:
1) cover resolves to absolute URL based on source_url origin
2) rendering does not route external cover through local `url_for`
3) page front-matter list is preferred over theme config items
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run generation to capture current failing behavior**

Run:
```bash
hexo generate
```
Expected (before fix): generated bangumi card may contain incorrect cover URL for relative metadata image or mixed source ownership behavior.

- [ ] **Step 3: Implement minimal normalization changes in generator**

```js
const toAbsoluteUrl = (value, baseUrl) => {
  if (!value || !isHttpUrl(baseUrl)) return value;
  if (isHttpUrl(value)) return value;
  try {
    return new URL(value, baseUrl).toString();
  } catch {
    return value;
  }
};

const normalizeItem = (item = {}, metadata = {}) => {
  const sourceUrl = firstValue(item.source_url, item.source, item.url);
  const metadataCover = toAbsoluteUrl(metadata.cover, sourceUrl);
  const url = firstValue(item.url, metadata.url, sourceUrl);

  return {
    title: firstValue(item.title, metadata.title),
    origin_title: firstValue(item.origin_title, item.originTitle, metadata.origin_title),
    cover: firstValue(item.cover, metadataCover),
    url,
    status: item.status,
    rating: item.rating,
    episodes: item.episodes,
    year: item.year,
    tags: normalizeTags(item.tags),
    summary: firstValue(item.summary, item.description, metadata.summary),
    source_url: sourceUrl,
  };
};
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Update template rendering rule for external/local cover**

```ejs
<%_ const isExternalCover = /^https?:\/\//i.test(item.cover || ''); _%>
<img
  class="bangumi-cover"
  src="<%- isExternalCover ? item.cover : url_for(item.cover, {relative: false}) %>"
  alt="<%= item.title || '' %>"
>
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Run generation to verify pass criteria**

Run:
```bash
hexo generate
```
Expected: generation succeeds; external cover URLs remain absolute and valid in generated bangumi HTML.

- [ ] **Step 6: Commit**

```bash
git add scripts/generator/bangumi.js layout/bangumi.ejs
git commit -m "fix: normalize bangumi metadata cover resolution"
```

### Task 2: Add experimental Bilibili fetch with explicit fallback to front-matter

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/generator/bangumi.js`
- Modify: `_config.yml`
- Test: `scripts/generator/bangumi.js` (runtime verification via `hexo generate`)

- [ ] **Step 1: Write failing behavior checks for fallback contract**

```md
Scenario A: bilibili.enable=true + valid response => use fetched list
Scenario B: bilibili.enable=true + request fails => fallback to page.bangumi
Scenario C: bilibili.enable=false => use page.bangumi directly
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run baseline generation before implementing fetch branch**

Run:
```bash
hexo generate
```
Expected: no Bilibili branch exists; output depends on current page/theme item selection only.

- [ ] **Step 3: Implement optional Bilibili fetch branch in generator**

```js
const bilibiliTimeout = 5000;

const fetchBilibiliBangumi = async (uid, cache) => {
  const cacheKey = `bilibili:${uid}`;
  if (cache[cacheKey]) return cache[cacheKey];
  if (typeof fetch !== "function" || !uid) return [];

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), bilibiliTimeout);
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`https://api.bilibili.com/x/space/bangumi/follow/list?type=1&pn=1&ps=30&vmid=${uid}`, {
      headers: { "user-agent": "hexo-theme-reimu bangumi fetcher" },
      signal: controller.signal,
    });
    if (!response.ok) return [];
    const json = await response.json();
    const list = Array.isArray(json?.data?.list) ? json.data.list : [];
    const normalized = list.map((entry) => ({
      title: entry.title,
      origin_title: entry.org_title,
      cover: entry.cover,
      status: entry.new_ep?.index_show || entry.progress,
      rating: entry.score || undefined,
      year: entry.pub_year || undefined,
      summary: entry.evaluate,
      source_url: entry.url,
      url: entry.url,
      tags: [],
    }));
    cache[cacheKey] = normalized;
    return normalized;
  } catch {
    return [];
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
};
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Wire priority logic (bilibili -> manual fallback) with page as source of truth**

```js
const getBangumiPage = (locals) => {
  const pages = locals.pages || [];
  return pages.findOne
    ? pages.findOne({ layout: "bangumi" }) || pages.findOne({ path: "bangumi/index.html" })
    : null;
};

hexo.extend.generator.register("bangumi", async function (locals) {
  const cache = readCache();
  const bangumiPage = getBangumiPage(locals);
  const pageItems = Array.isArray(bangumiPage?.bangumi) ? bangumiPage.bangumi : [];
  const bilibili = bangumiPage?.bilibili || {};

  let sourceItems = pageItems;
  if (bilibili.enable && bilibili.uid) {
    const fetchedItems = await fetchBilibiliBangumi(String(bilibili.uid), cache);
    if (fetchedItems.length) sourceItems = fetchedItems;
  }

  // normalize sourceItems + metadata fill and persist to bangumi_items
});
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Add explicit config comments in `_config.yml`**

```yml
bangumi:
  enable: true
  title: 追番列表
  subtitle: 把喜欢的作品、补番进度和观后感收进同一页。
  description: 页面显示文案；具体条目请在 bangumi 页面 front-matter 的 bangumi 字段维护。
  # items: (deprecated) 请改用页面 front-matter: bangumi
```

- [ ] **Step 6: Verify fallback behavior**

Run:
```bash
hexo generate
```
Expected: generation succeeds even when Bilibili request fails; manual `page.bangumi` remains effective fallback.

- [ ] **Step 7: Commit**

```bash
git add scripts/generator/bangumi.js _config.yml
git commit -m "feat: add experimental bilibili bangumi fallback flow"
```

### Task 3: Compact bangumi card UI and remove `bangumi-card-note`

**Files:**
- Modify: `layout/bangumi.ejs`
- Modify: `source/css/_partial/bangumi.styl`
- Test: `layout/bangumi.ejs`, `source/css/_partial/bangumi.styl` (runtime verification via generated HTML/CSS)

- [ ] **Step 1: Write failing UI assertions**

```md
1) bangumi-card-note element must not exist in rendered HTML
2) card visual density should improve (smaller cover width, smaller paddings, reduced title size)
3) mobile single-column should avoid oversized cover-driven card heights
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Confirm existing output still contains `bangumi-card-note`**

Run:
```bash
hexo generate
```
Expected (before change): generated bangumi HTML contains `bangumi-card-note` nodes.

- [ ] **Step 3: Remove note rendering and footer placeholder text from template**

```ejs
<%_ if (item.summary) { _%>
  <p class="bangumi-summary"><%= item.summary %></p>
<%_ } _%>
<div class="bangumi-card-footer">
  <%_ if (item.url) { _%>
    <a class="bangumi-link" href="<%- url_for(item.url, {relative: false}) %>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">查看条目</a>
  <%_ } _%>
</div>
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Apply compact style changes in Stylus**

```stylus
.bangumi-card
  gap: 12px
  padding: 14px

.bangumi-cover-wrap
  width: 112px

.bangumi-card-title
  font-size: 18px

.bangumi-summary
  margin: 12px 0 0

.bangumi-card-footer
  margin-top: 12px

.bangumi-link
  padding: 8px 12px

```

```stylus
}
```

### Task 4: Backup and remove bottom whitening overlay effect

**Files:**
- Create: `backup/2026-05-25-bottom-whitening/source/css/style.styl`
- Modify: `source/css/style.styl`
- Test: `source/css/style.styl` (runtime verification via generated CSS)

- [ ] **Step 1: Capture failing visual hypothesis and impacted selectors**

```md
Likely whitening contributors:
- .global-hero-background:before gradient in source/css/style.styl
- #wrap background gradient in source/css/style.styl

Goal: remove near-bottom whitening while preserving background image and glass look.
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Create required backup before edits**

Run:
```bash
mkdir -p backup/2026-05-25-bottom-whitening/source/css
cp source/css/style.styl backup/2026-05-25-bottom-whitening/source/css/style.styl
```
Expected: backup file exists before any styling edits.

- [ ] **Step 3: Apply minimal whitening-removal edits**

```stylus
.global-hero-background
  &:before
    background: transparent

#wrap
  background: transparent
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Verify build and CSS output**

Run:
```bash
hexo generate
```
Expected: build succeeds and no regressions from syntax errors.

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit backup + style change**

```bash
git add backup/2026-05-25-bottom-whitening/source/css/style.styl source/css/style.styl
git commit -m "style: remove bottom whitening overlay with backup"
```

### Task 5: Replace dark mode switch markup and styles (behavior-compatible)

**Files:**
- Modify: `layout/_partial/header.ejs`
- Modify: `source/css/_partial/header.styl`
- Test: `source/js/script.js` compatibility (manual runtime verification)

- [ ] **Step 1: Define failing interaction checks**

```md
1) #dark-mode-switch still exists and toggles modes in cycle auto -> false -> true
2) new control displays moon/sun icon states based on checked value
3) keyboard focus ring still visible
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Confirm current switch still uses old track/thumb structure**

Run:
```bash
hexo generate
```
Expected (before change): markup includes `.dark-mode-switch-track` and `.dark-mode-switch-thumb`.

- [ ] **Step 3: Replace EJS switch markup with requested structure**

```ejs
<label class="dark-mode-switch" for="dark-mode-switch" aria-label="Theme mode switch">
  <input id="dark-mode-switch" class="dark-mode-switch-input" type="checkbox">
  <span class="dark-mode-switch-box" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <svg class="dark-mode-icon dark-mode-icon-moon" viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M82.1,61.2a31.9,31.9,0,0,1-12.4,2.4A33.3,33.3,0,0,1,36.4,30.3a31.9,31.9,0,0,1,2.4-12.4A33.3,33.3,0,1,0,82.1,61.2Z"></path>
  </svg>
  <svg class="dark-mode-icon dark-mode-icon-sun" viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M50,18v3.6m0,56.8V82M82,50H78.4M21.6,50H18M72.6,72.6l-2.5-2.5M29.9,29.9l-2.5-2.5m45.2,0-2.5,2.5M29.9,70.1l-2.5,2.5M64.2,50A14.2,14.2,0,1,1,50,35.8,14.3,14.3,0,0,1,64.2,50Z"></path>
  </svg>
</label>
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Replace old switch stylus rules with new box/icon variant**

```stylus
.dark-mode-switch
  position: relative
  display: inline-flex
  align-items: center
  justify-content: center
  width: 44px
  height: 44px

.dark-mode-switch-input
  position: absolute
  opacity: 0
  inset: 0

.dark-mode-switch-box
  width: 44px
  height: 44px
  border-radius: 10px
  border: 2px solid var(--red-4)
  background: unquote('color-mix(in srgb, var(--red-6) 86%, transparent)')
  box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 1px var(--red-2)

.dark-mode-icon
  position: absolute
  width: 22px
  height: 22px
  fill: none
  stroke-width: 8
  stroke-linecap: round
  stroke-linejoin: round
  transition: opacity .25s

.dark-mode-icon-sun
  stroke: var(--red-1)
  opacity: 1

.dark-mode-icon-moon
  stroke: var(--red-2)
  opacity: 0

.dark-mode-switch-input:checked ~ .dark-mode-icon-sun
  opacity: 0

.dark-mode-switch-input:checked ~ .dark-mode-icon-moon
  opacity: 1
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Verify behavior compatibility**

Run:
```bash
hexo generate
```
Expected: build succeeds; in browser the existing `source/js/script.js` continues to control mode cycle via `#dark-mode-switch`.

- [ ] **Step 6: Commit**

```bash
git add layout/_partial/header.ejs source/css/_partial/header.styl
git commit -m "style: redesign dark mode switch with square icon control"
```
